info.name: Kelompok 1 - Identity & SSO (Direct Port 8081 - Full JSON Response)
info.description: Sama persis dengan COMPLETE, tapi mengakses LANGSUNG ke port 8081 (bypass Gateway). Semua response akan berupa JSON murni dari aplikasi, bukan teks Gateway.

variable.description: API Key untuk endpoint /internal. Sesuaikan dengan .env di server.
UUID Talent user, otomatis terisi saat Register Talent berhasil.

request.description:
Mengecek status layanan Identity SSO.

### Expected Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": "ok",
  "service": "identity-and-sso-service",
  "uptime": 1234.56,
  "timestamp": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

Endpoint root API.

### Expected Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Welcome to identity-and-sso-service API",
  "version": "1.0.0"
}
```

Mendaftarkan user baru dengan role talent atau client. Role admin tidak diizinkan melalui endpoint ini.

Script otomatis menyimpan `id` user ke variabel `talent_user_id` (digunakan untuk Deactivate User).

### Expected Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid-otomatis",
      "name": "User Talent Baru",
      "email": "talent_baru@example.com",
      "role": "talent",
      "skills": ["FRONTEND_DEVELOPMENT"],
      "subSkills": ["REACT"],
      "isActive": true,
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

### Error: Email sudah terdaftar (409)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Email already registered"
}
```

### Error: Rate limit (429) - Maksimal 5x per jam
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Too many requests, please try again later",
  "retryAfter": 3540
}
```

Login sebagai Talent. Token Access & Refresh otomatis tersimpan ke Collection Variables (`talent_access_token`, `talent_refresh_token`).

### Expected Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "User Talent Baru",
      "email": "talent_baru@example.com",
      "role": "talent",
      "skills": ["FRONTEND_DEVELOPMENT"],
      "subSkills": ["REACT"],
      "isActive": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Error: Kredensial salah (401)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid credentials or account is inactive"
}
```

### Error: Rate limit (429) - Maksimal 10x per 15 menit
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Too many requests, please try again later",
  "retryAfter": 720
}
```

Login atau Register otomatis menggunakan Google ID Token. Jika email belum terdaftar, sistem akan membuat akun baru secara otomatis.

**Cara mendapat Google ID Token:** Gunakan Google Sign-In di frontend lalu ambil `credential` dari response Google.

### Expected Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Google login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Nama dari Google",
      "email": "user@gmail.com",
      "role": "talent",
      "skills": [],
      "subSkills": [],
      "isActive": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Error: idToken tidak valid (401)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid Google token"
}
```

exec: console.log("Google Auto-Register berhasil! Role otomatis: client");

request.description:
## Register / Login Otomatis via Google (SSO)

Endpoint ini berfungsi GANDA:
- Jika email Google **BELUM** terdaftar -> otomatis **REGISTER** akun baru dengan role **client**
- Jika email Google **SUDAH** terdaftar -> otomatis **LOGIN** langsung

Anda tidak perlu mendaftar secara manual terlebih dahulu!

---

## Cara Mendapatkan Google ID Token

**Langkah 1:** Buka https://developers.google.com/oauthplayground

**Langkah 2:** Di kolom kiri, cari dan expand "Google OAuth2 API v2", lalu centang:
- https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email
- https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.profile

**Langkah 3:** Klik tombol "Authorize APIs" -> Login dengan akun Google Anda.

**Langkah 4:** Klik tombol "Exchange authorization code for tokens".

**Langkah 5:** Di panel kanan, cari tulisan id_token. Copy seluruh nilai string panjang (berawalan eyJ...) tersebut.

**Langkah 6:** Paste ke field "idToken" di body request ini, lalu klik Send.

---

## Expected Response - Akun Baru (Register Otomatis)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid-baru-otomatis",
      "name": "Nama dari Profil Google",
      "email": "email@gmail.com",
      "role": "client",
      "skills": [],
      "subSkills": [],
      "isActive": true
    }
  }
}
```

## Expected Response - Akun Sudah Ada (Login Otomatis)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "user": {
      "role": "client",
      "isActive": true
    }
  }
}
```

## Error: Token tidak valid / kadaluarsa (401)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Invalid Google idToken"
}
```
> Solusi: Ulangi langkah di OAuth Playground. Token Google hanya berlaku sekitar 1 jam.

Mendapatkan data profil lengkap milik user yang sedang login.

### Expected Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "User Talent Baru",
      "email": "talent_baru@example.com",
      "role": "talent",
      "skills": ["FRONTEND_DEVELOPMENT"],
      "subSkills": ["REACT"],
      "isActive": true,
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "projectCompletions": [
        {
          "id": "uuid",
          "projectId": "proj-001",
          "tokenId": "123",
          "ipfsUri": "ipfs://...",
          "completionDate": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

### Error: Token tidak ada (401)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Unauthorized: No token provided"
}
```

Mencabut sesi Talent. Access Token masuk ke Blacklist Redis, Refresh Token dihapus dari database.

**PERHATIAN:** Setelah Logout, token yang digunakan tidak bisa dipakai lagi. Harus Login ulang.

### Expected Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

Mencabut sesi Admin. Token Admin masuk ke Blacklist Redis, Refresh Token dihapus dari database.

**PERHATIAN:** Setelah Logout, Anda harus Login Admin kembali untuk mengakses fitur admin lagi.

### Expected Response (200)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

query.description: Filter: LOGIN_SUCCESS | LOGIN_FAILED | LOGOUT | REGISTER | TOKEN_REFRESH | USER_DEACTIVATED | PROJECT_COMPLETED

request.description:
Mencatat penyelesaian proyek oleh Talent (digunakan oleh Bidding Service atau Tracker Service).

**PENTING:** `talent_id` harus berupa UUID user yang valid dan ber-role `talent`.

### Expected Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Project completion recorded",
  "data": {
    "completion": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "talentId": "uuid-talent",
      "projectId": "PROJECT-001",
      "tokenId": "NFT-TOKEN-123",
      "ipfsUri": "ipfs://QmExampleHash123...",
      "completionDate": "2024-06-01T10:00:00.000Z",
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

### Error: Bukan Talent (400)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "User is not a talent"
}
```

### Error: Project sudah dicatat sebelumnya (409)
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Project completion already exists"
}
```
